title: Hide Migration-Specific Fields from Dictionary View
story: As a DataTools Pro user viewing the Data Dictionary, I want migration-specific columns hidden from the Dictionary view, so that I only see fields relevant to understanding and documenting my Salesforce data model.
description:
Several columns that belong exclusively to the Migration workflow are incorrectly appearing in the Dictionary view. These columns should be hidden when the Dictionary view is active.

Columns to hide from Dictionary:
- Migrate
- Mapped Field
- Notes
- Logic
- Metric Relation (this is not a field attribute — a separate junction object will be created for this relationship in the future)
acceptance_criteria: Migrate column is hidden in Dictionary view
Mapped Field column is hidden in Dictionary view
Notes column is hidden in Dictionary view
Logic column is hidden in Dictionary view
Metric Relation column is hidden in Dictionary view
All five columns remain visible in Migration view
Column visibility toggles correctly when switching between views
ux_changes: Five migration-specific columns (Migrate, Mapped Field, Notes, Logic, Metric Relation) are hidden when the Dictionary view is active. They remain visible in Migration view.
implementation_notes: Metric Relation is being hidden because it is not a field attribute. A future junction object will be created to properly model the metric-to-field relationship.
comment_summary: Developer completed the column hiding on development and submitted for review.
